title: Postgraduate initial teacher training targets: 2025 to 2026
body: "This publication provides national level postgraduate initial teacher training (PGITT) targets for the 2025 to 2026 academic year and compares them to targets for the previous year.  This publication includes:   an Excel workbook of the calculations behind the targets the methodology used to calculate the targets  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
